featureDetection.rationale: Probes for globalThis.LanguageDetector or ai.languageDetector support and adapts the badge status and fallback model seamlessly.

gracefulFallback.rationale: Includes a fully functioning custom character-set heuristic fallback detector so the page operates perfectly even when the native API is unavailable.

genuineInteraction.rationale: Provides a text input box, interactive presets in multiple languages, and live detection results.

builderMultipleDemos.rationale: Part of an excellent set of 4 distinct interactive concepts detailing the Language Detector API.

designSystemContrast.rationale: Complies strictly with the design system styles and keeps AA contrast standards.

references.rationale: Correctly includes the required link referencing chromestatus.com/feature/6494349985841152.
